questions.question_text_full: Which statement is NOT true according to the passage?

options.text: High yielding seeds and fertilizers were a hallmark of green revolution.
The rice yield in India is below that of China by 39%.
The growth in productivity has stagnated today.
In Northwest India, farmers get subsidies on rice, wheat and other crops.

questions.correct_option_text: The rice yield in India is below that of China by 39%.
